member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.Engineering
member.summary: This class extracts the engineering files in the json file.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.Engineering.EngineeringMode
member.summary: Enum to determine the Engineering Mode to be used at Runtime.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.Engineering.EngineeringMode.PRODUCTION_NORMAL
member.summary: Normal means just reloading the aleph configurations

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.Engineering.EngineeringMode.ENGINEERING_SAFE
member.summary: ENGINEERING_SAFE means to load aleph and specified configurations as long as there are no name conflicts.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.Engineering.EngineeringMode.ENGINEERING_UNSAFE
member.summary: ENGINEERING_UNSAFE means name conflicts may exist and engineering provided names will override aleph configurations.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.Engineering.Configurations
member.summary: Gets or sets EngineeringConfiguration list.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.Engineering.Configuration
member.summary: This Class holds the Engineering Configuration fields supported in the Engineering Configuration File in Json Format.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.Engineering.Configuration.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets Name in the Engineering Configuration.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.Engineering.Configuration.Files
member.summary: Gets or sets Files in the Engineering Configuration.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.Engineering.Configuration.Mode
member.summary: Gets or sets Mode for the Runtime in the Engineering Configuration.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.PatConfigEngineering
member.summary: This class contains the logic on how to set and apply data on PatConfigEngineering handles.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.PatConfigEngineering.AddEngineeringConfigurations(System.Collections.Generic.List{Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.Engineering.Configuration},Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Add Engineering configurations in addition to the loaded configurations from env file in aleph init.
member.param: Configuration containing the files and mode to be used for the engineering run.
The session context of this operation.
member.returns: True if all configurations were loaded correctly, else return false.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.PrimePatConfigEngineeringTestMethod
member.summary: Allow users to apply pattern modifies and fuse configs using PatConfigService.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.PrimePatConfigEngineeringTestMethod.EngineeringConfigurationFile
member.summary: Gets or sets EngineeringConfigurationFile name.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.PrimePatConfigEngineeringTestMethod.EngineeringJson
member.summary: Gets or sets the EngineeringJson file data contents.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.PrimePatConfigEngineeringTestMethod.ParseEngineeringFile
member.summary: This function parses the Engineering Config json file and stores it into EngineeringConfiguration.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.PrimePatConfigEngineeringTestMethod.VerifyEngineeringConfigurationFile
member.summary: This private function verifies that the engineering configuration file parameter is not empty.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.PrimePatConfigReApplyTestMethod
member.summary: Dummy description of this test method.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.DffHandle
member.summary: This class represents handle containing dynamic value of type DFF.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.DffHandle.#ctor(System.String,Prime.PatConfigService.IPatConfigHandle,System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Data to be set on the handler.
handler to set data.
a specific configuration element inside the handle to apply data.
This session context.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.DffHandle.SubConfigName
member.summary: Gets or Sets SubConfigName name .

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.DffHandle.DieId
member.summary: Gets or Sets DieId.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.DffHandle.OPTYPE
member.summary: Gets or Sets OPTYPE.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.DffHandle.TokenName
member.summary: Gets or Sets TokenName.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.DffHandle.PatConfigHelper
member.summary: Gets PatConfigHelper to use helper methods.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.IDynamicDataHandle
member.summary: This interface represents handle containing dynamic data.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.IDynamicDataHandle.Handle
member.summary: Gets IPatConfigHandle.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.IDynamicDataHandle.DynamicValue
member.summary: Gets dynamic data to be applied.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.IDynamicDataHandle.SetData
member.summary: Sets dynamic data on handler on execution time.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.PatConfig
member.summary: This class contains the logic on how to set and apply data on PatConfig handles.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.PatConfig.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.PatConfig.DataSource
member.summary: Enumerated type for selecting data source.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.PatConfig.DataSource.Raw
member.summary: Raw data source.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.PatConfig.DataSource.UserVar
member.summary: UserVar data source.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.PatConfig.DataSource.SharedStorage
member.summary: SharedStorage data source.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.PatConfig.DataSource.DFF
member.summary: SharedStorage data source.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.PatConfig.SessionContext
member.summary: Gets or sets the session context.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.PatConfig.DynamicDataToApply
member.summary: Gets handles that needs to set data during execute.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.PatConfig.HandlesByName
member.summary: Gets or Sets HandlesByName.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.PatConfig.AddHandler(Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.PatConfigJsonFile.SetPoint.Configuration,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Gets handle and add to list checking if needs to use plist or not.
member.param: Configuration containing name of the handle to get.
Pattern list name used to get handle.
Regular expression to reduce patterns to apply data on.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.PatConfig.ApplyHandles
member.summary: Applies handles checking if there is handles with dynamic data that needs to be set.
member.returns: True if all handles were applied correctly, else return false.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.PatConfig.ClearHandles
member.summary: Clears lists of handles for prevent cumulative handles each time verify is run.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.PatConfig.GetPatConfigHandle(System.String,System.String,System.String,Prime.PatConfigService.AdvanceGetHandleOptions)
member.summary: Gets handle checking if needs to use plist or not.
member.returns: IPatConfigHandle to be added to list.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.PatConfig.BuildDynamicHandle(Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.PatConfigJsonFile.SetPoint.Configuration,Prime.PatConfigService.IPatConfigHandle)
member.summary: Constructs handle with dynamic data depending on Data source.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.PatConfig.SetDataToHandlesWithDynamicSource
member.summary: Iterates over handles with dynamic data and sets data on each one.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.PatConfigHelper
member.summary: This class represents a helper for PatConfig test method.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.PatConfigHelper.SetUpHandlerData(System.String,Prime.PatConfigService.IPatConfigHandle,System.String)
member.summary: Checks if need to set or fill data on handler and apply it.
member.param: Data to be applied.
Handler to apply data.
a specific configuration element inside the handle to apply data.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.PatConfigHelper.ConvertDataToSymbol(System.Char)
member.summary: Converts data to PatConfig symbol.
member.returns: PatConfig symbol to be used on fill data.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.PatConfigJsonFile
member.summary: This class represents the data structure of the PinData json input file.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.PatConfigJsonFile.SetPoints
member.summary: Gets or sets SetPoints list.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.PatConfigJsonFile.SetPoint
member.summary: This class represents each SetPoint structure contained in the configuration file.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.PatConfigJsonFile.SetPoint.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets SetPoint name.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.PatConfigJsonFile.SetPoint.Configurations
member.summary: Gets or sets Configuration list.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.PatConfigJsonFile.SetPoint.Configuration
member.summary: This class represents each Configuration structure contained in the configuration file.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.PatConfigJsonFile.SetPoint.Configuration.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets Configuration name.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.PatConfigJsonFile.SetPoint.Configuration.SubConfigElement
member.summary: Gets or sets Configuration Element.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.PatConfigJsonFile.SetPoint.Configuration.InPkgApplyToPkgOnly
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether gets or sets a value for InPKGApplyToPKGOnly.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.PatConfigJsonFile.SetPoint.Configuration.ToBeStored
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether in the configuration is going to be stored.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.PatConfigJsonFile.SetPoint.Configuration.Ratio
member.summary: Gets or sets a the ratio to override the configuration's ratio.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.PatConfigJsonFile.SetPoint.Configuration.Source
member.summary: Gets or sets data source.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.PatConfigJsonFile.SetPoint.Configuration.Data
member.summary: Gets or sets Configuration data.

member.summary: Gets or Sets configuration data.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.PatConfigJsonFile.SetPoint.Configuration.SetSharedStorage
member.summary: Gets or sets Configuration data.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.PatConfigJsonFile.SetPoint.Configuration.SetDff
member.summary: Gets or sets Configuration data.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.PrimePatConfigTestMethod
member.summary: Allow users to apply pattern modifies and fuse configs using PatConfigService.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.PrimePatConfigTestMethod.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.PrimePatConfigTestMethod.#ctor(Prime.BusinessLogic.InputData.IInputDataFactory)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class. Receives an IFileWrapper mock object from the unit test.
member.param: IInputDataFactory mock object.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.PrimePatConfigTestMethod.ConfigurationFile
member.summary: Gets or sets ConfigurationFile name.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.PrimePatConfigTestMethod.SetPoint
member.summary: Gets or sets a comma separated string with one or more SetPoint names.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.PrimePatConfigTestMethod.Plist
member.summary: Gets or sets Pattern list name.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.PrimePatConfigTestMethod.RegEx
member.summary: Gets or sets pattern regex.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.PrimePatConfigTestMethod.PatConfigJson
member.summary: Gets or sets the PatConfigJson file data contents.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.PrimePatConfigTestMethod.PatConfigData
member.summary: Gets or sets PatConfigData object, contains the logic to set and apply data.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.PrimePatConfigTestMethod.ParseJsonFile
member.summary: This function parses the PinData json file and stores its data into the PinDataJsonFile member.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.PrimePatConfigTestMethod.VerifyConfigurationFile
member.summary: This private function verifies that the configuration file parameter is not empty.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.PrimePatConfigTestMethod.PopulateHandles
member.summary: This private function verifies that the configuration file data is valid.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.PrimePlatformPatternCachingTestMethod
member.summary: Test method responsible for executing different variations of functional test.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.PrimePlatformPatternCachingTestMethod.CachingBehaviors
member.summary: The type of caching behavior to use on the platform.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.PrimePlatformPatternCachingTestMethod.CachingBehaviors.DoNotCache
member.summary: Do not cache.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.PrimePlatformPatternCachingTestMethod.CachingBehaviors.ForceCache
member.summary: Force caching.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.PrimePlatformPatternCachingTestMethod.CachingBehaviors.MayCache
member.summary: Let to the platform if caching or not.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.PrimePlatformPatternCachingTestMethod.CachingBehavior
member.summary: Gets or sets the caching behaviour of the TOS hardware iterator.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.PrimePlatformPatternCachingTestMethod.EntryCapacity
member.summary: Gets or sets the entry capacity of the pattern memory cache.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.PrimePlatformPatternCachingTestMethod.VectorCapacity
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum amount of vectors in the pattern memory cache.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PatternModify.PrimePlatformPatternCachingTestMethod.MaxVectorEntrySize
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum size of an entry to be accepted into the cache.
